ddls:
CREATE TABLE "browsing_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browsing history entry */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the visited website */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visited website */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the website has been visited */,
  "typed_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the URL has been typed */,
  "last_visit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last visit */,
  "hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is hidden from the user */,
  "favicon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the favicon associated with the website */,
  "starred_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bookmark status of the website */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who visited the website */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL that referred the user to the current site */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsing_history_favicon_id FOREIGN KEY ("favicon_id") REFERENCES favicon ("favicon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsing_history_starred_id FOREIGN KEY ("starred_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("starred_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favicon" (
  "favicon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favicon */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the favicon image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the favicon */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website the favicon is associated with */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the favicon image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favicon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmarks" (
  "starred_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark status */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is bookmarked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bookmark status was set */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who bookmarked the website */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder where the bookmark is stored */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes added by the user for the bookmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("starred_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, premium user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last active session */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred language, theme) */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* User privacy settings (e.g., data sharing preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the website */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browsing history entry */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., visit, refresh) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES browsing_history ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browsing history entry */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score of the website */,
  "last_engaged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last engagement with the website */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the website */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Specific actions taken by the user (e.g., clicks, scrolls) */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of engagement in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_engagement_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES browsing_history ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browsing history entry */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content on the website */,
  "content_data" TEXT /* Data of the content (e.g., HTML, JSON) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the content */,
  "content_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the content for quick comparison */,
  "content_length" INTEGER /* Length of the content in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_content_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES browsing_history ("id")
)
